sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69573" key="mwluth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μωλ-ῡτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n69573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parboiler, simmerer</tr_>, metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπέων</foreign> Timo<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
